name: @radzor/usage-metering
description: Track and bill usage-based metrics. Record usage events against named meters, query usage summaries over time periods, and trigger threshold alerts for overage billing.

inputs.name: secretKey
inputs.description: Stripe secret API key for reporting metered usage to Stripe Billing.

inputs.name: flushIntervalMs
inputs.description: Interval in milliseconds for flushing batched usage records.

inputs.name: storageBackend
inputs.description: Where to store usage records. 'memory' for local tracking, 'stripe' to also report to Stripe Billing.

outputs.name: usageSummary
outputs.description: Aggregated usage data for a customer and meter.

fields.name: totalQuantity
fields.description: Total usage quantity in the queried period.

fields.name: recordCount
fields.description: Number of individual usage records in the period.

events.name: onThresholdReached
events.description: Fired when a customer's usage crosses a configured threshold.

actions.name: recordUsage

params.name: meterId
params.description: Meter identifier to record usage against.

actions.description: Record a usage event against a meter for a customer.

actions.name: getUsageSummary

params.name: periodStart
params.description: Start of the period (ISO 8601 date string).

params.name: periodEnd
params.description: End of the period (ISO 8601 date string).

actions.description: Get aggregated usage for a customer and meter over a time period.

actions.name: createMeter
actions.description: Create a named meter with optional threshold for alerts.

connectsTo.description: Alert customer when usage threshold reached

llm.constraints: In-memory storage is not persistent across restarts. For production, use 'stripe' backend with a valid Stripe secret key. Meters must be created before recording usage. Threshold events fire once per threshold crossing per period.
